_comment: Inference price book. Values are CREDITS per 1,000,000 tokens (prompt+completion). At the 10000 credits/USDC peg, 4000 credits = $0.40 / 1M tokens. The ladder scales with model heaviness (params → unified-memory + slower tok/s on a Mac, so bigger models cost the provider more and bill the customer more); it's anchored on the 12B primary at 4000. Keep roughly in step with deploy/models.json and the points modelWeight curve. 'default' applies to any model not listed.
